title: UPIP: Universal Process Integrity Protocol — A Self-Validating Specification
description: UPIP is a five-layer protocol for capturing, bundling, and verifying the complete integrity of computational processes across machines. This publication is self-validating: the paper is generated by a deterministic script exported as a UPIP bundle. Anyone can reproduce the bundle to regenerate the paper, proving the protocol works. Cross-machine isomorphism verified between heterogeneous systems (Python 3.13/Debian 13 and Python 3.11/Debian 12).
